text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 237 

TOT_PPS_CPTL_AMT 

LABEL: Total PPS Capital Amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The total amount (rounded to whole dollars) that is payable for capital for the prospective payment 
system (PPS) (e.g., reimbursement for depreciation, rent, certain interest, real estate taxes for hospital 
buildings/equipment that are subject to PPS). 

SHORT NAME: PPS_CPTL 

LONG NAME: TOT_PPS_CPTL_AMT 

TYPE: NUM
